recommendations.title: Dark Eyes
recommendations.overview: Aboard a ship early in the 20th-century, a middle-aged Italian tells his story of love to a Russian.

recommendations.title: 12 Angry Men
recommendations.overview: The defense and the prosecution have rested and the jury is filing into the jury room to decide if a young Spanish-American is guilty or innocent of murdering his father. What begins as an open and shut case soon becomes a mini-drama of each of the j

recommendations.title: The Barber of Siberia
recommendations.overview: Douglas is a foreign entrepreneur, who ventures to Russia in 1885 with dreams of selling a new, experimental steam-driven timber harvester in the wilds of Siberia. Jane is his assistant. On her travels, she meets two men who would change her life for

recommendations.title: Burnt by the Sun
recommendations.overview: Russia, 1936: revolutionary hero Colonel Kotov is spending an idyllic summer in his dacha with his young wife and six-year-old daughter Nadia and other assorted family and friends. Things change dramatically with the unheralded arrival of Cousin Dmit

recommendations.title: A Time to Kill
recommendations.overview: A young lawyer defends a black man accused of murdering two white men who raped his 10-year-old daughter, sparking a rebirth of the KKK.

recommendations.title: Haider
recommendations.overview: A young man returns to Kashmir after his father's disappearance to confront his uncle - the man he suspects to have a role in his father's fate.

recommendations.title: The Long Goodbye
recommendations.overview: In 1970s Hollywood, Detective Philip Marlowe tries to help a friend who is accused of murdering his wife.

recommendations.title: Juror #2
recommendations.overview: While serving as a juror in a high profile murder trial, family man Justin Kemp finds himself struggling with a serious moral dilemma…one he could use to sway the jury verdict and potentially convict—or free—the accused killer.

recommendations.title: The Life of David Gale
recommendations.overview: A man against capital punishment is accused of murdering a fellow activist and is sent to death row.

recommendations.title: 12 Angry Men
recommendations.overview: During the trial of a man accused of his father's murder, a lone juror takes a stand against the guilty verdict handed down by the others as a result of their preconceptions and prejudices.
